name: CAF validation layer
description: Bundled n8n workflows: validation router (4.1), sync decisions (4.2), rework flow, and CAF rework orchestrator.

parameters.jsCode: return $input.all().map(i => ({ json: { ...i.json, __src: "job_drafts" }}));
return $input.all().map(i => ({ json: { ...i.json, __src: "content_jobs" }}));
return $input.all().map(i => ({ json: { ...i.json, __src: "review_queue" }}));

const item = $json;
const m = item.mutation || {};
const base = m.base_record || item;
const review = base.review || {};
const job = base.job || {};
const latestDraft = base.latest_draft || {};
const nowIso = base._generated_at || new Date().toISOString();

const pick = (...vals) => vals.find(v => v !== undefined && v !== null && String(v).trim() !== '');
const clone = (obj) => JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(obj || {}));

const versionName = base.variation_name || `v${base.revision_round_next}`;

const newDraft = {
  ...clone(latestDraft),
  draft_id: base.draft_id_next,
  task_id: base.task_id_next,
  candidate_id: base.candidate_id_next,
  run_id: pick(base.run_id, latestDraft.run_id, job.run_id, review.run_id, ''),
  project: pick(base.project, latestDraft.project, job.project, review.project, ''),
  platform: pick(base.platform, latestDraft.platform, job.platform, review.platform, ''),
  flow_type: pick(base.flow_type, latestDraft.flow_type, job.flow_type, review.flow_type, ''),
  variation_name: versionName,
  attempt_no: base.attempt_no_next || 1,
  revision_round: base.revision_round_next,
  generation_reason: `REWORK_${base.rework_mode}`,
  generation_notes: JSON.stringify(base.review_feedback || {}),
  generated_title: m.generated_title || '',
  generated_hook: m.generated_hook || '',
  generated_caption: m.generated_caption || '',
  generated_slides_json: m.generated_slides_json || '',
  generated_hashtags_json: m.generated_hashtags_json || '',
  generated_render_json: m.generated_render_json || '',
  preview_url: m.preview_url || '',
  created_at: nowIso,
  created_by: pick(base.review_feedback?.validator, 'CAF_REWORK_ORCHESTRATOR'),
  response_id: '',
  model: pick(job.model, review.model, latestDraft.model, ''),
  model_used: pick(job.model, review.model, latestDraft.model_used, ''),
  recommended_route: 'HUMAN_REVIEW',
  carousel: job.carousel || review.carousel || '',
  slide_count: pick(job.slide_count, review.slide_count, latestDraft.slide_count, ''),
  hashtags_json: m.generated_hashtags_json || job.hashtags_json || review.hashtags_json || '',
  slides_json: m.generated_slides_json || job.slides_json || review.slides_json || '',
  status: 'NEEDS_REVIEW',
  signal_pack_run_id: pick(base.signal_pack_run_id, latestDraft.signal_pack_run_id, job.signal_pack_run_id, review.signal_pack_run_id, ''),
  task_seq: pick(job.task_seq, review.task_seq, latestDraft.task_seq, ''),
  debug_task_id: pick(job.debug_task_id, review.debug_task_id, latestDraft.debug_task_id, ''),
  flow_type_key: pick(job.flow_type_key, review.flow_type_key, latestDraft.flow_type_key, ''),
  platform_key: pick(job.platform_key, review.platform_key, latestDraft.platform_key, ''),
  origin_platform: pick(job.origin_platform, review.origin_platform, latestDraft.origin_platform, base.platform, ''),
  target_platform: pick(job.target_platform, review.target_platform, latestDraft.target_platform, base.platform, ''),
  parent_candidate_id: base.parent_candidate_id || base.candidate_id || '',
  parent: base.task_id,
  asset_id: '',
  asset_type: pick(job.asset_type, review.asset_type, latestDraft.asset_type, ''),
  asset_version: '',
  qc_status: 'PENDING_REVIEW',
  render_provider: pick(base.preserve?.render_provider, review.render_provider, job.render_provider, latestDraft.render_provider, ''),
  render_status: 'PENDING',
  render_job_id: '',
  video_url: '',
  generated_at: nowIso,
  video: pick(job.video, review.video, latestDraft.video, ''),
  mode: pick(job.mode, review.mode, latestDraft.mode, ''),
  hook: m.generated_hook || '',
  spoken_script: m.spoken_script || job.spoken_script || review.spoken_script || '',
  cta: m.cta || job.cta || review.cta || '',
  disclaimer: m.disclaimer || job.disclaimer || review.disclaimer || '',
  caption: m.generated_caption || '',
  estimated_runtime_seconds: pick(job.estimated_runtime_seconds, review.estimated_runtime_seconds, latestDraft.estimated_runtime_seconds, ''),
  beats_json: m.beats_json || job.beats_json || review.beats_json || '',
  dialogue_json: m.dialogue_json || job.dialogue_json || review.dialogue_json || '',
  on_screen_text_json: m.on_screen_text_json || job.on_screen_text_json || review.on_screen_text_json || '',
  visual_direction_json: m.visual_direction_json || job.visual_direction_json || review.visual_direction_json || '',
  camera_instructions_json: pick(job.camera_instructions_json, review.camera_instructions_json, latestDraft.camera_instructions_json, ''),
  editing_notes_json: pick(job.editing_notes_json, review.editing_notes_json, latestDraft.editing_notes_json, ''),
};

const newContentJob = {
  ...clone(job),
  task_id: base.task_id_next,
  project: pick(base.project, job.project, review.project, ''),
  run_id: pick(base.run_id, job.run_id, review.run_id, ''),
  candidate_id: base.candidate_id_next,
  response_id: '',
  model: pick(job.model, review.model, latestDraft.model_used, ''),
  platform: pick(base.platform, job.platform, review.platform, ''),
  flow_type: pick(base.flow_type, job.flow_type, review.flow_type, ''),
  draft_id: base.draft_id_next,
  revision_round: base.revision_round_next,
  carousel: job.carousel || review.carousel || '',
  variation_name: versionName,
  slide_count: pick(job.slide_count, review.slide_count, latestDraft.slide_count, ''),
  hashtags_json: m.generated_hashtags_json || job.hashtags_json || review.hashtags_json || '',
  slides_json: m.generated_slides_json || job.slides_json || review.slides_json || '',
  status: 'IN_REVIEW',
  recommended_route: 'HUMAN_REVIEW',
  render_pack_json: m.generated_render_json || job.render_pack_json || review.render_pack_json || '',
  template_key: pick(base.preserve?.template_key, job.template_key, review.template_key, ''),
  skip_write: '',
  skip_reason: '',
  signal_pack_run_id: pick(base.signal_pack_run_id, job.signal_pack_run_id, review.signal_pack_run_id, ''),
  task_seq: pick(job.task_seq, review.task_seq, ''),
  debug_task_id: pick(job.debug_task_id, review.debug_task_id, ''),
  flow_type_key: pick(job.flow_type_key, review.flow_type_key, ''),
  platform_key: pick(job.platform_key, review.platform_key, ''),
  origin_platform: pick(job.origin_platform, review.origin_platform, base.platform, ''),
  target_platform: pick(job.target_platform, review.target_platform, base.platform, ''),
  parent: base.task_id,
  asset_id: '',
  asset_type: pick(job.asset_type, review.asset_type, ''),
  asset_version: '',
  qc_status: 'PENDING_REVIEW',
  render_provider: pick(base.preserve?.render_provider, job.render_provider, review.render_provider, ''),
  render_status: 'PENDING',
  render_job_id: '',
  video_url: '',
  generated_at: nowIso,
  video: pick(job.video, review.video, ''),
  mode: pick(job.mode, review.mode, ''),
  hook: m.generated_hook || '',
  spoken_script: m.spoken_script || job.spoken_script || review.spoken_script || '',
  cta: m.cta || job.cta || review.cta || '',
  disclaimer: m.disclaimer || job.disclaimer || review.disclaimer || '',
  caption: m.generated_caption || '',
  estimated_runtime_seconds: pick(job.estimated_runtime_seconds, review.estimated_runtime_seconds, ''),
  beats_json: m.beats_json || job.beats_json || review.beats_json || '',
  dialogue_json: m.dialogue_json || job.dialogue_json || review.dialogue_json || '',
  on_screen_text_json: m.on_screen_text_json || job.on_screen_text_json || review.on_screen_text_json || '',
  visual_direction_json: m.visual_direction_json || job.visual_direction_json || review.visual_direction_json || '',
  camera_instructions_json: pick(job.camera_instructions_json, review.camera_instructions_json, ''),
  editing_notes_json: pick(job.editing_notes_json, review.editing_notes_json, ''),
  status_out: 'NEEDS_REVIEW',
  raw_keys: '',
  heygen_render_input_json: pick(job.heygen_render_input_json, review.heygen_render_input_json, ''),
  parse_error: '',
  output: '',
  job: '',
  heygen_render_input_json_string: pick(job.heygen_render_input_json_string, review.heygen_render_input_json_string, ''),
  stage: 'REWORK',
  brand_constraints: pick(job.brand_constraints, review.brand_constraints, ''),
  risk_rules: pick(job.risk_rules, review.risk_rules, ''),
  allowed_flow: pick(job.allowed_flow, review.allowed_flow, ''),
  platform_constraints: pick(job.platform_constraints, review.platform_constraints, ''),
  prompt_versions: pick(job.prompt_versions, review.prompt_versions, ''),
  llm_system: pick(job.llm_system, review.llm_system, ''),
  llm_user: pick(job.llm_user, review.llm_user, ''),
  llm_temperature: pick(job.llm_temperature, review.llm_temperature, ''),
  llm_max_tokens: pick(job.llm_max_tokens, review.llm_max_tokens, ''),
  stage3_template_used: pick(job.stage3_template_used, review.stage3_template_used, ''),
  stage3_output_schema: pick(job.stage3_output_schema, review.stage3_output_schema, ''),
  stage3_output_schema_version: pick(job.stage3_output_schema_version, review.stage3_output_schema_version, ''),
  heygen_render_input_json_string_full_length: pick(job.heygen_render_input_json_string_full_length, review.heygen_render_input_json_string_full_length, ''),
  heygen_render_input_json_string_parts_count: pick(job.heygen_render_input_json_string_parts_count, review.heygen_render_input_json_string_parts_count, ''),
  heygen_render_input_json_string_p1: pick(job.heygen_render_input_json_string_p1, review.heygen_render_input_json_string_p1, ''),
  heygen_render_input_json_string_p2: pick(job.heygen_render_input_json_string_p2, review.heygen_render_input_json_string_p2, ''),
  heygen_render_input_json_string_p3: pick(job.heygen_render_input_json_string_p3, review.heygen_render_input_json_string_p3, ''),
  heygen_render_input_json_string_p4: pick(job.heygen_render_input_json_string_p4, review.heygen_render_input_json_string_p4, ''),
  __truncated: '',
  __note: `Generated by ${m.route}`,
  __payload: JSON.stringify({ rework_mode: base.rework_mode, edit_scope: base.edit_scope }),
  parent_candidate_id: base.parent_candidate_id || base.candidate_id || '',
};

const newCandidate = {
  candidate_id: base.candidate_id_next,
  project: pick(base.project, review.project, job.project, ''),
  run_id: pick(base.run_id, review.run_id, job.run_id, ''),
  signal_pack_run_id: pick(base.signal_pack_run_id, review.signal_pack_run_id, job.signal_pack_run_id, ''),
  task_id: base.task_id_next,
  task_seq: pick(job.task_seq, review.task_seq, ''),
  debug_task_id: pick(job.debug_task_id, review.debug_task_id, ''),
  flow_type: pick(base.flow_type, review.flow_type, job.flow_type, ''),
  flow_type_key: pick(job.flow_type_key, review.flow_type_key, ''),
  variation_name: versionName,
  platform: pick(base.platform, review.platform, job.platform, ''),
  origin_platform: pick(job.origin_platform, review.origin_platform, base.platform, ''),
  target_platform: pick(job.target_platform, review.target_platform, base.platform, ''),
  platform_key: pick(job.platform_key, review.platform_key, ''),
  carousel_route: pick(job.carousel_route, review.carousel_route, ''),
  recommended_route: 'HUMAN_REVIEW',
  skip_write: '',
  skip_reason: '',
  candidate: JSON.stringify({
    generated_title: m.generated_title || '',
    generated_hook: m.generated_hook || '',
    generated_caption: m.generated_caption || '',
    generated_slides_json: m.generated_slides_json || '',
    generated_hashtags_json: m.generated_hashtags_json || '',
    preview_url: m.preview_url || '',
    spoken_script: m.spoken_script || '',
    cta: m.cta || '',
    disclaimer: m.disclaimer || '',
  }),
  context: JSON.stringify({
    parent_candidate_id: base.parent_candidate_id || base.candidate_id || '',
    parent_task_id: base.task_id,
    rework_mode: base.rework_mode,
    edit_scope: base.edit_scope,
    review_feedback: base.review_feedback || {},
  }),
  target_platforms: JSON.stringify([pick(base.platform, review.platform, job.platform, 'Instagram')]),
  target_platforms_json: JSON.stringify([pick(base.platform, review.platform, job.platform, 'Instagram')]),
};

const newReviewRow = {
  ...clone(review),
  task_id: base.task_id_next,
  candidate_id: base.candidate_id_next,
  run_id: pick(base.run_id, review.run_id, job.run_id, ''),
  project: pick(base.project, review.project, job.project, ''),
  platform: pick(base.platform, review.platform, job.platform, ''),
  flow_type: pick(base.flow_type, review.flow_type, job.flow_type, ''),
  variation_name: versionName,
  qc_status: 'PENDING_REVIEW',
  risk_score: '',
  recommended_route: 'HUMAN_REVIEW',
  preview_url: m.preview_url || '',
  generated_title: m.generated_title || '',
  generated_hook: m.generated_hook || '',
  generated_caption: m.generated_caption || '',
  generated_slides_json: m.generated_slides_json || '',
  generated_hashtags_json: m.generated_hashtags_json || '',
  review_status: 'NEEDS_REVIEW',
  decision: '',
  rejection_tags: '',
  notes: '',
  final_title_override: '',
  final_hook_override: '',
  final_caption_override: '',
  final_slides_json_override: '',
  validator: '',
  submit: 'false',
  submitted_at: '',
  synced_at: nowIso,
  response_id: '',
  model: pick(job.model, review.model, latestDraft.model_used, ''),
  carousel: newContentJob.carousel || '',
  slide_count: newContentJob.slide_count || '',
  hashtags_json: newContentJob.hashtags_json || '',
  slides_json: newContentJob.slides_json || '',
  status: 'IN_REVIEW',
  render_pack_json: newContentJob.render_pack_json || '',
  template_key: newContentJob.template_key || '',
  skip_write: '',
  skip_reason: '',
  signal_pack_run_id: newContentJob.signal_pack_run_id || '',
  task_seq: newContentJob.task_seq || '',
  debug_task_id: newContentJob.debug_task_id || '',
  flow_type_key: newContentJob.flow_type_key || '',
  platform_key: newContentJob.platform_key || '',
  origin_platform: newContentJob.origin_platform || '',
  target_platform: newContentJob.target_platform || '',
  parent: base.task_id,
  asset_id: '',
  asset_type: newContentJob.asset_type || '',
  asset_version: '',
  render_provider: newContentJob.render_provider || '',
  render_status: 'PENDING',
  render_job_id: '',
  video_url: '',
  generated_at: nowIso,
  video: newContentJob.video || '',
  mode: newContentJob.mode || '',
  hook: newContentJob.hook || '',
  spoken_script: newContentJob.spoken_script || '',
  cta: newContentJob.cta || '',
  disclaimer: newContentJob.disclaimer || '',
  caption: newContentJob.caption || '',
  estimated_runtime_seconds: newContentJob.estimated_runtime_seconds || '',
  beats_json: newContentJob.beats_json || '',
  dialogue_json: newContentJob.dialogue_json || '',
  on_screen_text_json: newContentJob.on_screen_text_json || '',
  visual_direction_json: newContentJob.visual_direction_json || '',
  camera_instructions_json: newContentJob.camera_instructions_json || '',
  editing_notes_json: newContentJob.editing_notes_json || '',
  status_out: 'NEEDS_REVIEW',
  raw_keys: '',
  heygen_render_input_json: newContentJob.heygen_render_input_json || '',
  parse_error: '',
  output: '',
  job: '',
  heygen_render_input_json_string: newContentJob.heygen_render_input_json_string || '',
  stage: 'REWORK',
  brand_constraints: newContentJob.brand_constraints || '',
  risk_rules: newContentJob.risk_rules || '',
  allowed_flow: newContentJob.allowed_flow || '',
  platform_constraints: newContentJob.platform_constraints || '',
  prompt_versions: newContentJob.prompt_versions || '',
  llm_system: newContentJob.llm_system || '',
  llm_user: newContentJob.llm_user || '',
  llm_temperature: newContentJob.llm_temperature || '',
  llm_max_tokens: newContentJob.llm_max_tokens || '',
  stage3_template_used: newContentJob.stage3_template_used || '',
  stage3_output_schema: newContentJob.stage3_output_schema || '',
  stage3_output_schema_version: newContentJob.stage3_output_schema_version || '',
  heygen_render_input_json_string_full_length: newContentJob.heygen_render_input_json_string_full_length || '',
  heygen_render_input_json_string_parts_count: newContentJob.heygen_render_input_json_string_parts_count || '',
  heygen_render_input_json_string_p1: newContentJob.heygen_render_input_json_string_p1 || '',
  heygen_render_input_json_string_p2: newContentJob.heygen_render_input_json_string_p2 || '',
  heygen_render_input_json_string_p3: newContentJob.heygen_render_input_json_string_p3 || '',
  heygen_render_input_json_string_p4: newContentJob.heygen_render_input_json_string_p4 || '',
  __truncated: '',
  __note: `Rework candidate generated from ${base.task_id}`,
  __payload: JSON.stringify({ rework_mode: base.rework_mode, edit_scope: base.edit_scope }),
  parent_candidate_id: base.parent_candidate_id || base.candidate_id || '',
  draft_id: base.draft_id_next,
  attempt_no: base.attempt_no_next || 1,
  revision_round: base.revision_round_next,
  prompt_name: pick(latestDraft.prompt_name, ''),
  prompt_version: pick(latestDraft.prompt_version, ''),
  config_version: pick(latestDraft.config_version, ''),
  schema_version: pick(latestDraft.schema_version, ''),
  model_used: pick(latestDraft.model_used, job.model, review.model, ''),
  generation_reason: `REWORK_${base.rework_mode}`,
  generation_notes: JSON.stringify(base.review_feedback || {}),
  generated_render_json: m.generated_render_json || '',
  created_at: nowIso,
  created_by: pick(base.review_feedback?.validator, 'CAF_REWORK_ORCHESTRATOR'),
  draft_created_at: nowIso,
};

const oldReviewUpdate = {
  task_id: base.task_id,
  submit: 'false',
  synced_at: nowIso,
  review_status: 'REWORKED',
  status_out: 'REWORKED',
  __note: `Superseded by ${base.task_id_next}`,
};

return [{
  json: {
    draft_row: newDraft,
    content_job_row: newContentJob,
    candidate_row: newCandidate,
    new_review_row: newReviewRow,
    old_review_update: oldReviewUpdate,
    task_id_original: base.task_id,
    task_id_next: base.task_id_next,
    candidate_id_next: base.candidate_id_next,
    draft_id_next: base.draft_id_next,
    rework_mode: base.rework_mode
  }
}];
return [{ json: $json.draft_row || {} }];
return [{ json: $json.content_job_row || {} }];
return [{ json: $json.candidate_row || {} }];
return [{ json: $json.new_review_row || {} }];
return [{ json: $json.old_review_update || {} }];
return $input.all();
